quiz.question:
White gives a check on a2. Their idea is to keep checking our king since our e-pawn is dangerously close to promotion.

Should we take the draw or continue fighting by running the king to d4/e4?

answers.text: We should take the draw. Running the king will allow White to stop the e-pawn.

feedback.text: That's right, we have to keep in mind that  White has some dangerous pawns on their own!

distractors.text: We should continue fighting. White will have a hard time stopping the e-pawn.

feedback.text: If our king gets too far away, White simply puts their king on f2. Their pawns are stronger in the endgame.
